commit.message:
Fix pivoting-agent lint: put search_skills/list_skills on same line as "do not"

The lint test checks per-line for search_skills()/list_skills() references
and only exempts lines containing "do not" or "never call". The prohibition
was split across two lines, so the line with the function names didn't match.

commit.message:
Add pivot-aware scanning to network-recon, improve dashboard agent lifecycle

network-recon skill:
- Add "Pivot Mode" section with two-phase scanning approach
- Phase 1: fast host discovery on pivot host (ARP, ping sweep, DNS zone,
  single-port proxychains sweep)
- Phase 2: targeted nmap through proxychains on known-live hosts only
- Document nmap MCP server limitation (no proxychains support)
- Add static nmap alternative for speed-critical scenarios
- Add pivot-specific troubleshooting entries

Dashboard (tail-agent.py):
- Auto-discover new agents from tasks directory (no .dashboard file needed)
- Red *stopped* indicator in pane header for dead agents
- Detect agent completion via JSONL final message + 5s mtime debounce
- Detect killed agents (TaskStop) via 30s mtime staleness
- Keep stopped agents visible instead of auto-removing
- Space bar toggles agents in/out from browser overlay

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix V1 pricing fallback: set price column and is_available = true

1. Write price column (not just cm_price/direct_price) — guest-facing
   code reads price column for display
2. Set is_available = true when V1 has valid rate rules — V2 Calendar
   often reports Fixed Price rooms as unavailable even when bookable

Both UPDATE and INSERT paths fixed.

Add network pivoting support: tunnels table, pivoting-agent, interim writes

  pivot_host, target_subnet, local_endpoint, requires_proxychains, status
- Add tunnel MCP tools: get_tunnels (all modes), add_tunnel (interim+writer),
  update_tunnel (writer only); include Tunnels section in get_state_summary()
- Remove CHECK constraint from state_events.event_type to allow 'tunnel' events

  for tunnel setup via pivoting-tunneling skill with sudo handoff protocol
- Update all 5 discovery skills to use state-interim MCP with interim writes
  (add_credential, add_vuln, add_pivot, add_blocked) for real-time findings
- Add pivoting workflow to orchestrator: pivot-to-tunnel flow, tunnel context
  in agent prompts, tunnel health checks, pivoting-agent routing
- Update docs: CLAUDE.md, state-server README, orchestrator routing tables

commit.message:
V1 pricing fallback: use parent room rates for linked/dependent rooms

When a room has 0 V1 rate rules, check raw_data dependencies for
includeBookingsRoomId1 (Beds24's parent room link). If found, use
the parent room's rate rules for pricing. No extra API call needed —
getRates already returns all rooms in the property.

Fixes rooms 550515-550517 (Reine des mers child rooms) which inherit
pricing from parent room 550667 (Villa entière).

Migrate registry client, CLI, and dashboard to use scoped pack refs
(@username/slug) for install, report, and search. Publish keeps using
the short slug (server infers username from auth token). Add packApiPath
helper for URL-safe scoped path segments.

Extract resolveDefaultPacksDir() to @showrun/core so dashboard and CLI
share the same fallback chain (env → local ./taskpacks → system data dir).

Remove SKILL.md (no longer tracked).

* feat: bump to 0.1.10-rc.2, fix release rollback to use in-memory snapshots

Bump all package versions from rc.1 to rc.2. Release script rollback
now snapshots package.json contents before modification and restores
from memory instead of git checkout, preventing multi-version revert
when the working tree has prior uncommitted changes.

commit.message:
Review fixes: bugs, cleanup, and improvements

Bugs fixed:
- Remove skip_global_compinit (let oh-my-zsh handle compinit)
- Remove duplicate cargo source from .zshrc (already in .zshenv)
- Hardcode conda paths (avoid slow brew --caskroom subprocess)
- Remove duplicate catppuccin tmux plugin
- Fix tmux % split direction (was -v, should be -h)
- Fix btop theme path (use name "dracula" instead of versioned Cellar path)
- Fix SSH trailing colon on network.git.cz.o2
- Fix SSH config corruption from sed backreference

Cleanup:
- Remove ~100 lines of oh-my-zsh boilerplate comments from .zshrc
- Delete dead .zsh/starship.zsh (only had commented-out p10k/spaceship)
- Remove duplicate python=python3 alias (PATH already handles it)
- Remove 23 lines of dead tmux comments

Improvements:
- Use $HOME instead of hardcoded path for oh-my-zsh
- Move PATH exports (openjdk, libpq, lm-studio) from .zshrc to .zshenv
- Add SSH AddKeysToAgent, ServerAliveInterval, ServerAliveCountMax
- Normalize SSH keyword capitalization (HostName, IdentityFile, etc.)
- Set starship python_binary="python3" to avoid slow 3.14 detection

commit.message:
Fix Electron: run Next.js programmatically, not via spawn

- Use APP_ROOT = path.join(__dirname, '..') so the path is correct
  whether running in dev, plain production dir, or inside an ASAR archive
- Set asar: false in electron-builder config — Next.js App Router spawns
  worker threads that are separate Node processes and cannot read from an
  ASAR virtual filesystem, causing a silent white-screen failure
- Load the window via 127.0.0.1 (more reliable than localhost in Electron)
- Add startup error page so failures are visible instead of blank white screen
- Add console.log checkpoints to trace APP_ROOT and userData path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
グラフ日本語文字化け修正・スクロール対応・引き継ぎドキュメント追加

- components/plot_utils.py: sns.set_style()がフォント設定を上書きしていた問題を修正
  フォント設定をset_styleの後に移動、起動時にキャッシュから使用可能フォントを自動選択
- main.py: ft.Tabsにexpand=Trueを追加しページ下部の見切れを修正
- docs/handover_20260305.md: セッション作業ログと次セッション引き継ぎ情報を記録

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: cross-platform direct mode, crash fixes, perf optimization (v4.3.0)

Major fixes addressing all 3 tester reports:

1. CROSS-PLATFORM: checkConflict() now supports direct (action, lock) calls
   without brain.json. Non-MCP platforms (Lovable, Bolt, etc.) can call
   checkConflict("action", "lock") or checkConflict("action", [locks]).
   Also exports analyzeConflict and scoreConflict for direct API usage.

2. CRASH FIXES: speclock_health and session_briefing handlers now have
   full null-safety (brain.specLock?.items, brain.sessions?.history, etc.)
   and try-catch wrappers. No more crashes on fresh/uninitialized projects.

3. PERFORMANCE: Action-side caching in scoreConflict reduces 25-lock check
   from 4.4 seconds to 37ms (119x speedup). tokenize + expandSemantics +
   classifyIntent computed once per action, reused across all locks.

4. FALSE POSITIVE: Removed checkout → payment → stripe concept chain.
   "Make checkout faster" no longer triggers Stripe payment locks.

5. VERSION: All version strings updated to 4.3.0 (was showing 3.5.0/3.5.4).

6. DESCRIPTION: Removed "100% detection" claim from package.json.

Tests: 612/612 heuristic + 15/17 direct mode (2 grey-zone for Gemini).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix shrink wizard crash: dialog_radiolist needs triples not pairs

_shrink_wizard() built shrink_items as pairs (tag, desc) but
dialog_radiolist expects triples (tag, desc, on/off). Under set -u,
accessing items[i+2] caused "unbound variable" which killed the
subshell → returned TUI_BACK silently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement comprehensive stats dashboard with charts and visualizations

Added new stats tab layout following recommended design with hybrid approach:
- Summary cards showing total/daily/weekly/anytime completions and current streak
- 30-day trend line chart with 3 separate lines for Daily, Weekly, Anytime goals
- Best day of week bar chart (Daily goals only)
- Category breakdown doughnut chart (all goals aggregated)
- Personal vs Couple comparison bar chart
- Calendar heatmap showing last 12 weeks of activity
- Achievement badges system with progress tracking

Implemented using Chart.js for visualizations. All colors defined as CSS variables following existing color scheme. Charts use wireframe design aesthetic matching Personal (teal) and Couple (pink/red) tabs.

Version: v4.5.0

Pass Address objects to getContract to skip all btc_publicKeyInfo RPCs

The regtest node's btc_publicKeyInfo endpoint intermittently returns
502. By passing pre-resolved Address objects (instead of strings) for
both the contract and sender, the SDK skips address resolution RPCs
entirely. Only btc_call is needed for simulation.

Add complete Sens Bar Association scraper with advanced name separation

- Extracts all 30 lawyers from Barreau de Sens
- Advanced first name/last name separation algorithm
- Handles complex names (Anne-Gaëlle, BOICHÉ-CALLUS, LE CHEVOIR, etc.)
- Supports special characters (Españita, Léonce, etc.)
- 100% phone number extraction rate
- Complete addresses with postal codes
- Multiple output formats (CSV, JSON, TXT, detailed report)

📊 Data extracted:
- 30 lawyers total
- 2 compound first names
- 6 compound/multiple last names
- 30 phone numbers (100% coverage)
- 30 complete addresses
- Geographic distribution: Sens (28), Saint-Julien-du-Sault (1), Charny (1)

⚠️ Limitations:
- No emails (not publicly available)
- No specializations (not shown on website)
- No oath dates (not available)

- 创建 products-db.js，使用 Prisma 进行数据库查询
- 支持品牌、分类、系列、价格区间、标签、关键词筛选

commit.message:
feat(remote-control): add getWindows() fallback + pixel screenshot endpoint

Option A — Fix systemui capture bug:
- Add getAppRootWindow() helper that falls back to windows (getWindows())
  when rootInActiveWindow returns com.android.systemui or android
- Picks highest-layer TYPE_APPLICATION window from all visible windows
- captureScreenTree() and findNodeById() both use getAppRootWindow()
- flagRetrieveInteractiveWindows already set in accessibility_service_config.xml

Option B — Pixel screenshot endpoint:
- Backend: POST /api/device/screenshot → emits device:screenshot-request
- Backend: POST /api/device/screenshot-result → resolves pending long-poll
- Android: AccessibilityService.takeScreenshot() (API 30+)
  converts hardware bitmap → software → JPEG 70% → base64 → posts result
- SocketManager: device:screenshot-request flow added
- Rate limit: 2000ms min between screenshots
- Skill doc: documented screenshot endpoint with when-to-use guidance

commit.message:
Add neuromorphic DevTools: Recording, Experiment, Plot, Adapters

Pivot from compiler-only to DevTools platform based on researcher feedback
(Giacomo Indiveri, INI Zurich). No experiment tracking tool exists for
neuromorphic - this fills the gap for both analog and digital hardware.

New modules:
- nuro.recording: Hardware-agnostic Recording class (numpy-first, HDF5)
- nuro.experiment: Experiment tracking with metadata, metrics, persistence
- nuro.plot: Visualization (raster, voltage traces, firing rates, dashboard)
- nuro.adapters: GPU, Loihi, Samna, CSV/HDF5/numpy/NIR file imports
- nuro.cloud: Experiment storage stubs (deferred to v0.9)

Modified:
- callbacks.py: ExperimentCallback for auto-recording during runs
- __init__.py: Exports Experiment, Recording, plot, adapters
- pyproject.toml: devtools and samna optional dep groups

203 tests passing (168 existing + 35 new), zero breaking changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
